promoted_facts.fact: Aggregate existing unit sale prices ranged from $1.1M to $12.7M per group for groups of 1-3 units (2022-2024)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass B / Item 5, PDF page 14

promoted_facts.fact: Affiliate revenues: $53.0M from tech hardware/support, $39.1M from leases, $199K from YRSG development, $168K Mastercard rebates
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 8, PDF pages 25, 26, 29

promoted_facts.fact: TBC received $46.5M in aggregator royalties (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub) in FY2024
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 8, PDF page 27

promoted_facts.fact: Timeline from deposit to opening: approximately 4-6 months
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, PDF page 37

promoted_facts.fact: Site approval typically 30-60 days from complete site package submission
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, PDF page 37

promoted_facts.fact: NAFA (National Advertising Fund Administration) administered by TBC but Express licensees do NOT contribute to it
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Item 11, PDF page 43

promoted_facts.fact: Cross-default: breach of any agreement with franchisor/affiliates = breach of ALL agreements
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Item 17, PDF page 52

promoted_facts.fact: Relationship Agreement 95% FMV buyout option if Principal Operator departs or corporate structure changes without approval
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Item 17, PDF page 55

promoted_facts.fact: No confidentiality clauses signed with current/former licensees in last 3 fiscal years
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass F / Item 20, PDF page 62

promoted_facts.fact: Section 5.1 modernization protection: no re-imaging required unless Company commits to implement in ≥25% of company-operated US units
promoted_facts.source: Contract burden depth / License Agreement §5.1, PDF page 72

promoted_facts.fact: No force majeure clause in License Agreement
promoted_facts.source: Contract burden depth / License Agreement, PDF pages 70-80
